name: DynamoDB Admin
description: A web-based GUI for DynamoDB — browse tables, items and indexes, run queries and edit data. Connects to your local Floci DynamoDB endpoint out of the box.

aws.parity: Browses the very same tables locally (via the Floci endpoint on 4566) that you will see in the DynamoDB console — zero schema drift.
aws.deploy: Already Floci-wired: set DYNAMO_ENDPOINT to your real regional endpoint (or drop it) to inspect production DynamoDB.

variables.label: Web UI Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the DynamoDB Admin web UI.

variables.label: DynamoDB Endpoint
variables.description: URL of the DynamoDB endpoint. Defaults to Floci (LocalStack) on port 4566.

variables.label: AWS Region
variables.description: AWS region used when connecting to DynamoDB.
